description: A fine-tuned LLM drafts Module 3 regulatory submission sections; outputs flow into the submission dossier (a GxP record). A human reviews but does not check every citation. The model is periodically retrained on new submissions. Data: GxP records.
A locked, configured ML classifier flags out-of-spec results in QC; a human reviews and approves each flag before any batch decision; outputs are recorded in the QMS. Data: GxP records.
A continuously-learning predictive-maintenance model forecasts equipment failure on a non-GxP utility system; advisory only; no GxP records affected. Data: internal non-GxP.
A fine-tuned LLM automatically generates batch-release recommendations that act on GxP records without mandatory human review. Locked model. Data: GxP records.
An off-the-shelf LLM triages incoming deviations and suggests a category; advisory; outputs are NOT entered into GxP records (informal use); could influence quality judgment. Locked. Data: internal.
An off-the-shelf LLM answers employee questions about SOPs (a knowledge assistant). No patient-safety/product-quality/data-integrity impact; no GxP records; advisory. Locked. Data: internal.
A custom-built demand-forecasting model for commercial supply planning; no GxP impact; no GxP records; locked. Data: public/aggregate.

A custom computer-vision model performs automated visual inspection of filled vials and automatically rejects units, acting on GxP batch records without per-unit human review. Locked. Data: GxP records.

A fine-tuned, continuously-learning ML model predicts dosing for clinical decision support; a clinician reviews each recommendation; outputs are not auto-entered into GxP records but influence patient safety. Data: personal/PHI.
A configured LLM drafts CAPA records that are entered into the QMS after advisory human review; affects product quality/data integrity. Locked. Data: GxP records.
A rule-based (non-AI/deterministic) automation bot transfers values between systems and writes to GxP records automatically; no ML model. Data: GxP records.
An off-the-shelf LLM summarizes published scientific literature for a research team; no GxP impact; no GxP records; advisory; locked. Data: public.

An agentic AI tool auto-generates and executes computer-system-validation (CSV) protocols; it uses tools to pull system information and writes results into the validation record; a validation lead reviews and approves. Configured LLM, agentic, locked. Data: GxP records.

An agentic LLM continuously scans public FDA enforcement actions, warning letters, and guidance to flag supplier risk and inspection-readiness gaps; advisory; outputs inform quality decisions but are not auto-entered into GxP records. Data: public/external.

A custom, continuously-learning agentic AI autonomously adjusts critical process parameters on the live manufacturing line in real time, using tools to act on the MES without per-action human review ('self-healing'). Data: GxP records.
